itemListElement.reviewBody: Horrible principal, who does not know to respect her staff. Teaching faculty is tortured here. No norms are followed. Teachers do not have job security, draw less pay and are not given any mandatory employee benefits. The management has to look into this. With a dissastisfied team of teachers how will the quality of education be ensured?

itemReviewed.name: Birla Open Minds International School - Ambattur

itemListElement.reviewBody:
09.11.2023
I strongly recommend this is school for following..
1. First very good environment and spacious and clean
2. Management and teachers response hearing and answering sounds great..
appreciate for them listening, and answering politely with respect.
3. Main they convey information's through connecting apps and personalized whatsapp community..

Example. :
one day we sent my son to school after sent we had doubt with whether he has fever or not..
immediately i sent a message through WhatsApp community ,regarding please check my son temperature,
( they have a in house nurse..)
after 5 mints.   same WhatsApp I received a  message your son temperature is 97.5 and he is doing normal activities..
I am very much impressed and satisfied..

they providing very good transport facilities with live tracking facilities also i noticed they sending the boys and girls to bus with care, giving individual attendance.

and today 09.11.2023 recent communication from school is

Dear Parents

This is regarding the well-being of all students.

We kindly request that if your child is unwell, please keep him / her at home. It will speed up the recovery of the affected child and not pose risk for others as well.

The learning covered in class for all such days will be communicated to you by the respective teachers.

Let us together work towards a productive and safe learning environment for everyone.

We shall highly appreciate your understanding and cooperation in this regard.

Thank you for your support.

Principal ‎
BOMIS, Chennai

itemReviewed.name: Birla Open Minds International School - Ambattur

itemListElement.reviewBody: Very good school in this locality . Amazing infrastructure and good teaching faculties.
